AirAccount Onboarding

Create your ERC-4337 smart wallet on Sepolia

Connected:

Step 1 — Create Passkey

Register a P-256 WebAuthn passkey (fingerprint / Face ID). This will also connect your browser wallet as the account owner.

Step 2 — Configure Account

Choose a config template and adjust limits.

Step 3 — Create Account

Deploy your smart wallet via the factory contract.

Step 4 — Test Transaction

Send 0.001 ETH from your new smart wallet to verify it works.
